subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! What thou hadst written was known. It was a clear evidence of thy thoughtfulness
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
